name: Suzhou Sunmun Technology Co., Ltd.
summary: Suzhou Sunmun Technology Co., Ltd. engages in the research, production, and sale of water based colorants and computer toning integrated systems in the People's Republic of China. Its products include pigment printing paste, such as architectural pigment paste, water based industrial, and solvent based paste; textile fiber paste; latex paste; and SUA additives, as well as colorant used for coating, latex products, paper making, leather, textile, fiber, ink, etc. Suzhou Sunmun Technology Co., Ltd. was founded in 2001 and is headquartered in Kunshan, the People's Republic of China.
